}

")

print\('  ...'\)
for c in chunks[-3:]:

")

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
pairs = [json.loads\(l\) for l in open\('/Users/patdmccarthy/leek_j_t/08-scores/pairs.jsonl'\) if l.strip\(\)]
contradictions = [p for p in pairs if p.get\('nli',{}\).get\('top'\) == 'contradiction']
for p in contradictions:
    print\(f\\"=== {p['class_a']} x {p['class_b']} \(cos={p['cosine_similarity']}\) ===\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  A label: {p['label_a']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  B label: {p['label_b']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  A rep:   {p['rep_a_title']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  B rep:   {p['rep_b_title']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  A phrases: {p['top_phrases_a']}\\"\)
    print\(f\\"  B phrases: {p['top_phrases_b']}\\"\)
    nli = p.get\('nli', {}\)
    for label, score in zip\(nli.get\('labels',[]\), nli.get\('scores',[]\)\):
        print\(f\\"  {label}: {score}\\"\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts'\)
from arxiv_authors_to_graph import _clean_str
cases = [
    \('\\\\\\\\\\"u', 'ü'\),
    \('Grūz\\\\\\\\=ıtis', 'Grūzītis'\),
    \('Bl\\\\\\\\\\"ocker', 'Blöcker'\),
    \('Jan \\\\\\"Honza\\\\\\" Cernocky', 'Jan Honza Cernocky'\),
    \('Hein\\\\\\"am\\\\\\"aki', 'Heinämäki'\),
]
for inp, expected in cases:
    result = _clean_str\(inp\)
    status = '✓' if result == expected else f'✗ got {repr\(result\)}'
    print\(f'{status}  {repr\(inp\)} → {repr\(result\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'scripts'\)
from arxiv_authors_to_graph import _clean_str
cases = [
    \('\\\\\\\\\\"u',                   'ü',                  'backslash-umlaut'\),
    \('Gr\\u016bz\\\\\\\\=\\u0131tis',   'Gr\\u016bz\\u012btis', 'macron + dotless-i'\),
    \('Bl\\\\\\\\\\"ocker',             'Bl\\u00f6cker',       'backslash-umlaut mid-word'\),
    \('Jan \\\\\\"Honza\\\\\\" Cernocky','Jan \\\\\\"Honza\\\\\\" Cernocky', 'nickname \(kept\)'\),
    \('Hein\\\\\\"am\\\\\\"aki',         'Hein\\u00e4m\\u00e4ki','bare umlaut mid-word'\),
    \('\\\\\\\\v{C}ern\\u00fd',         '\\u010cern\\u00fd',     'caron-C'\),
    \('M\\u00fcller',               'M\\u00fcller',         'already unicode'\),
]
for inp, expected, label in cases:
    result = _clean_str\(inp\)
    ok = result == expected
    print\(f'  {\\"ok\\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}  {label}: {repr\(result\)}' + \('' if ok else f'  expected {repr\(expected\)}'\)\)
")

Bash(ls jeffrey_leek/07-representatives/ | wc -l && ls jeffrey_leek/08-scores/ && python3 -c "
import json
pairs = [json.loads\(l\) for l in open\('jeffrey_leek/08-scores/pairs.jsonl'\) if l.strip\(\)]
print\(f'{len\(pairs\)} scored pairs'\)
for p in sorted\(pairs, key=lambda x: -x.get\('cosine_similarity',0\)\)[:5]:
    nli = p.get\('nli',{}\)
    top = nli.get\('top','n/a'\) if isinstance\(nli,dict\) else 'n/a'
    print\(f\\"  {p['class_a']} x {p['class_b']}  cos={p['cosine_similarity']:.3f}  nli={top}\\"\)
")
